title: Working in Aotearoa
content:
## Working in Aotearoa , Te mahi i Aotearoa
Find out about different ways to shape your career.
- Featured guide Different ways of working Ngā tikanga mahi rerekē Find out about the many ways you can work in today’s world.

## Different ways of working

## Ngā tikanga mahi rerekē
Find out about the many ways you can work in today’s world.
- Guide Being your own boss Te mahi hei rangatira mōu anō Find out how to work for yourself – either on your own or by starting a business that employs other people.

## Te mahi hei rangatira mōu anō
Find out how to work for yourself – either on your own or by starting a business that employs other people.
- Guide Te Tiriti o Waitangi in work Te Tiriti o Waitangi kei te wāhi mahi Find out about Te Tiriti o Waitangi (the Treaty of Waitangi) and how it shapes workplaces in Aotearoa.

Find out about Te Tiriti o Waitangi (the Treaty of Waitangi) and how it shapes workplaces in Aotearoa.
- Guide Jobs in the future Ngā mahi hei āpōpō Do you worry that your perfect job will be stolen by a robot? Here are 5 ways to future-proof your career and make the most of being human.
Do you worry that your perfect job will be stolen by a robot? Here are 5 ways to future-proof your career and make the most of being human.
- Guide Kaupapa Māori career ideas Ngā whakaaro aramahi kaupapa Māori Tahatū Career Navigator features a number of kaupapa Māori career ideas in the mahi section. Find out more about these special jobs.
